superpowers.name: Soul Anchor
rules: When a non-Grunt character is Dazed or KO'd, this character may gain 1 POWER, remove up to 1 WOUND from itself, or remove up to 1 special conditions from itself.
Additionally, this character and other allied characters within RANGE 4 cannot lose POWER as a result of enemy effects.

superpowers.name: Mind Gem
rules: Choose an enemy character within RANGE 3 and advance it SHORT. This superpower may be used only once per turn.
